name: Lust Palace
description:
Inside the Dungeon of this Palace, you may find every Creature you desire, they are all at your Mercy.
From Human, Incubus, Wolfdemon, Shadow-Wolfdemon, Catdemon, Dragon, Angel, Elf, Fae, Siren, Mermaid, Centaur, Minotaur, Shapeshifters, Slimes all can be Male/female/Futanari.
Every Room of this dungeon is filled with a creature that wants your undivided attention, either fuck them, or get fucked!

(please give me your feedback on how it works, or if you think there is something i need to improve on, I would greatly appreciate it.)
